title: Medieval MC [NEOFORGE] MMC5
description: Version 1.21.1 | Medieval Fantasy RPG Adventure & Exploration for Modern Minecraft!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f6f7dbdaa10eea6742c54074e6d2476b2d58cc9.png)
![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

⚔️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-mc-neoforge-bmc5)

⚔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

⚔️ Beautiful New Overhauled World Generation ([Oh the Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone))

⚔️ Thousands of NEW Dungeons & Structures ([When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Luki's Grand Capitals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lukis-grand-capitals), [New Taverns and Trial Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns-woodland-mansion-replacement))

⚔️ Grow Your Own Kingdom

⚔️ Explore In depth Magic Mods and Become a Powerful Wizard ([Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks), [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau))

⚔️ Overhauled Stronghold & Fortress

⚔️ 50+ Quests to Guide You!

⚔️ QoL Features like [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap)
⚔️ An Immersive Medieval RPG Experience

⚔️ [250+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/58690/medieval-mc-neoforge-mmc5); Heavily Customized for Mod Integration and Compatibility

[![Live count of how many members are online in the Luna Pixel Studios discord server.](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=0843bf&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)
